div.p: Per RFC 791 - Fragment Context & Linked List

ul.li: Complete when: have_last_frag AND no gaps

div.p: Fragment Context (per datagram) Key: (src_ip, dst_ip, id, protocol)
Linked List (sorted by offset) Fragments received: [0-500], [500-1000], [1500-2000]
Reassembled Output (when complete) Original IP header + concatenated payloads
